description_long: This object consists of two modern smartphones, one with a blue back and the other with a red back, both featuring a flat, rectangular form with rounded corners. The backs of the phones display a prominent silver Apple logo centered vertically and horizontally. Each phone has a large, square camera module in the top left corner of the back, containing three camera lenses and a flash, with the module color matching the phone's body. The front of each phone is dominated by a large, edge-to-edge display with a black bezel and a visible notch at the top housing sensors and a front-facing camera. The sides of the phones are slim and metallic, with subtle button placements visible. The overall design is sleek, minimalistic, and characteristic of recent Apple iPhone models.
description: A pair of sleek, modern smartphones in blue and red, each with a large display, triple rear cameras, and a centered Apple logo.
description_view_0: Rear view showing both phones' colored backs, triple camera modules in the top left, and centered Apple logos.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the slimness of the phones and the protrusion of the camera modules.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the large screens with app icons, black bezels, and notches at the top for sensors.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile emphasizing the camera bump and the thin metallic edges of both phones.
attribute_brand_logo: A silver Apple logo is centered on the back of each phone, contrasting with the blue and red backgrounds.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screens show a typical smartphone home interface with app icons arranged in a grid, a status bar at the top, and a notch containing sensors and the front camera.
attribute_camera_placement: Each phone has a triple camera array in a square module located at the top left corner of the back, with three lenses and a flash arranged in a triangular pattern.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are subtly visible on the sides, likely including a power button on the right edge and volume buttons on the left edge.
